column1: # A changed path matching a row selects that row's test files; the smoke tier is
# ALWAYS unioned in. Lines beginning with # and blank lines are ignored. The glob
# is a bash [[ == ]] pattern, so * spans '/' — keep globs anchored to a directory.
# This map is a CONVENIENCE for local / CI-PR pre-checks only. It is deliberately
# coarse (directory-level) and FAIL-SAFE: a changed path matching NO row, any
# modules/core/* or tests/helpers/* change, or a change to this file itself forces
# the FULL suite. Nothing merges to main or releases on a narrowed run — the
# release gate and push-to-main always run full. When unsure, leave a path
# unmapped; it falls back to full.
# Derivation: each row lists the tests that load/exercise that module directory
# (evidence sweep over `source`/`load_modules` in tests/). Integration tests that
# completions of the binary, …) are intentionally NOT attributed to one module —
# an unmapped change runs them via the full fallback.
